name: Envoy Air

carryOn.notes: Operates as American Eagle. Follows American Airlines baggage policy.

economy.notes: $30 first bag, same as American Airlines.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Max 100Wh per battery. 101–160Wh with airline approval.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: Does Envoy Air have its own baggage rules?
faqs.answer: Envoy Air operates as American Eagle and follows American Airlines' baggage policies for all flights.
